title: protium subserratum
intro: Protium subserratum, also known as the Philippine Protium or Bunguran tree, is a species of plant native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. It is a type of evergreen tree that belongs to the family Burseraceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections. The leaves and bark of Protium subserratum are used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, which are believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing.
